series_metadata.series_title: Fee Schedules for VR Medical, Psychological & Dental Services
series_metadata.series_description: Schedules that set the maximum fees that medical, psychological and dental service providers can charge per service to the agency.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: superseded or no longer of use agency. when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: superseded or no longer of use agency. when no longer of administrative value
